parameters.url: ={{ $env.UTFPR_PORTAL_BASE_URL + '/' + encodeURIComponent(($items('Select UTFPR Course')[0] && $items('Select UTFPR Course')[0].json && $items('Select UTFPR Course')[0].json.codAluno) || '') + '/boletim' }}

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.value: ={{ 'Bearer ' + (($items('Select UTFPR Course')[0] && $items('Select UTFPR Course')[0].json && $items('Select UTFPR Course')[0].json.token) || '') }}
